title: Creamy Tuscan Chicken
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 25 min
Ingredients: 650 g chicken breast, 200 ml cream, 80 g sun-dried tomatoes, 2 garlic cloves, 80 g spinach, 30 g parmesan.
1) Season chicken with salt and pepper, sear 4-5 min per side.
2) Add garlic and tomatoes, cook 1 min.
3) Pour cream, add parmesan and simmer 5 min.
4) Fold in spinach and cook until wilted. Serve with pasta or rice.

title: Beef Bourguignon Bowl
instructions:
Servings: 5 · Prep: 20 min · Cook: 90 min
Ingredients: 900 g beef chuck, 2 carrots, 200 g mushrooms, 1 onion, 250 ml stock, 150 ml red wine.
1) Brown beef in batches.
2) Sauté vegetables for 6 min.
3) Add wine and stock, return beef.
4) Simmer covered 75-90 min until tender. Finish with parsley.

title: Lemon Garlic Salmon
instructions:
Servings: 3 · Prep: 10 min · Cook: 14 min
Ingredients: 3 salmon fillets, 1 lemon, 2 garlic cloves, 1 tbsp olive oil, dill, salt, pepper.
1) Place salmon skin-side down, season.
2) Drizzle oil, lemon juice, and garlic.
3) Bake at 200°C for 12-14 min.
4) Garnish with dill and extra lemon zest.

title: Spicy Chickpea Curry
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 12 min · Cook: 30 min
Ingredients: 2 cans chickpeas, 1 onion, 2 garlic cloves, 1 tbsp curry paste, 400 g tomatoes, 200 ml coconut milk.
1) Sauté onion and garlic until soft.
2) Add curry paste for 1 min.
3) Add tomatoes, chickpeas, coconut milk and simmer 20 min.
4) Serve with rice and coriander.

title: Classic Carbonara
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 10 min · Cook: 15 min
Ingredients: 360 g spaghetti, 150 g guanciale, 3 eggs + 1 yolk, 70 g pecorino, black pepper.
1) Cook pasta al dente.
2) Crisp guanciale in pan.
3) Whisk eggs, yolk, pecorino, pepper.
4) Toss hot pasta with guanciale and egg mix off heat.

title: Chicken Fajita Skillet
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 18 min
Ingredients: 600 g chicken strips, 2 bell peppers, 1 onion, 2 tsp paprika, 1 tsp cumin, lime.
1) Season chicken and sear 5-6 min.
2) Add sliced vegetables and cook 6-8 min.
3) Finish with lime juice.
4) Serve in warm tortillas with yogurt or salsa.

title: Roasted Tomato Soup
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 40 min
Ingredients: 1.2 kg tomatoes, 1 onion, 3 garlic cloves, 500 ml stock, basil, cream optional.
1) Roast tomatoes, onion, garlic at 210°C for 30 min.
2) Blend with stock until smooth.
3) Simmer 8 min and season.
4) Serve with basil and optional cream swirl.

title: Honey Sesame Tofu
instructions:
Servings: 3 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 15 min
Ingredients: 400 g firm tofu, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tsp sesame oil, spring onion, sesame seeds.
1) Press and cube tofu, pan-fry until golden.
2) Mix soy, honey, sesame oil and coat tofu.
3) Cook 2 min until glaze thickens.
4) Top with spring onion and sesame.

title: Baked Cod with Herbs
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 10 min · Cook: 16 min
Ingredients: 700 g cod fillets, 2 tbsp olive oil, parsley, thyme, lemon, 1 garlic clove.
1) Place cod in baking dish, season.
2) Add oil, garlic, herbs and lemon slices.
3) Bake at 200°C for 14-16 min.
4) Serve with roasted potatoes.

title: Mushroom Risotto
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 12 min · Cook: 30 min
Ingredients: 320 g arborio rice, 300 g mushrooms, 1 onion, 900 ml warm stock, 40 g parmesan.
1) Sauté onion and mushrooms.
2) Toast rice for 1 min.
3) Add stock gradually, stirring until creamy.
4) Finish with parmesan and butter.

title: Greek Chicken Bowl
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 20 min · Cook: 18 min
Ingredients: 600 g chicken thighs, 250 g rice, cucumber, tomato, olives, feta, lemon-oregano dressing.
1) Grill or pan-cook marinated chicken.
2) Cook rice and prep vegetables.
3) Assemble bowls with rice, chicken and toppings.
4) Drizzle dressing before serving.

title: Shakshuka with Feta
instructions:
Servings: 3 · Prep: 10 min · Cook: 22 min
Ingredients: 1 onion, 1 pepper, 400 g tomatoes, 4 eggs, 60 g feta, cumin, paprika.
1) Sauté onion and pepper.
2) Add tomatoes and spices, simmer 10 min.
3) Make wells, crack in eggs and cook covered 6-8 min.
4) Sprinkle feta and parsley.

title: Pulled Beef Tacos
instructions:
Servings: 6 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 120 min
Ingredients: 1.2 kg beef chuck, taco seasoning, 250 ml stock, onion, tortillas, lime.
1) Sear beef, add onion and stock.
2) Braise covered until shreddable.
3) Shred and reduce sauce.
4) Serve in tortillas with lime and salsa.

title: Berry Yogurt Parfait
instructions:
Servings: 2 · Prep: 8 min · Cook: 0 min
Ingredients: 300 g Greek yogurt, 120 g berries, 40 g granola, 1 tsp honey.
1) Layer yogurt, berries and granola in glasses.
2) Repeat once more.
3) Drizzle honey and serve chilled.

title: Teriyaki Chicken Noodles
instructions:
Servings: 4 · Prep: 15 min · Cook: 16 min
Ingredients: 500 g chicken, 300 g noodles, 2 carrots, broccoli, 3 tbsp teriyaki sauce.
1) Stir-fry chicken until cooked.
2) Add vegetables and cook 4 min.
3) Add cooked noodles and teriyaki sauce.
4) Toss 2 min and serve hot.

title: Apple Cinnamon Crumble
instructions:
Servings: 6 · Prep: 20 min · Cook: 35 min
Ingredients: 6 apples, 80 g sugar, 1 tsp cinnamon, 120 g flour, 80 g butter, 40 g oats.
1) Slice apples and mix with sugar and cinnamon.
2) Rub flour, butter and oats into crumble topping.
3) Bake at 190°C for 35 min until golden.
4) Serve warm with vanilla yogurt.
